git log: commit 8be6959 вЂ” 'chore(bus): ARCH-RT-6_day_one_architecture_guardrails_and_acceptance_gate kernel COMPLETE status' is the current HEAD on main. All ARCH-RT-1 through ARCH-RT-6 programme commits confirmed present. Baseline requirement satisfied.

No duplicate authority sources for completeness calculation: _evidence_completeness_for_rail() exists only in backend/core/analytics/domain_score_assembler.py:340-355. No second completeness source found. wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() in frontend/app/lib/wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts:22-28 is a display formatter only вЂ” it accepts numerator/denominator from DTO; it performs no independent clinical computation. This split is correct and must be preserved.

backend/core/analytics/domain_score_assembler.py:340-355 вЂ” _evidence_completeness_for_rail() uses: numerator=len(rail_data['biomarker_scores']), denominator=scored_count+len(missing_marker_ids). For blood sugar on analysis 18e14232: rail biomarker_scores contains HbA1c only (1); _missing_for_rail(hss, _RAIL_METABOLIC) returns [glucose, insulin] (2); result = 1 of 3. Compiled subsystem union via assemble_wave1_subsystem_evidence() (line 368): glycaemic_control={hba1c included, glucose missing}, insulin_metabolic={triglycerides included, insulin missing} в†’ union included={hba1c, triglycerides}, union missing={glucose, insulin} в†’ 2 of 4. Mismatch confirmed: rail-based = 1/3, subsystem-union = 2/4.

The fix must reorder _wave1_card_contract_extras() (domain_score_assembler.py:358-378): assemble subsystems first, then derive (numerator, denominator) from the union of SubsystemEvidenceV1.included_marker_ids and SubsystemEvidenceV1.missing_marker_ids across all returned rows. Do NOT read 'missing_biomarkers' from the scoring rail for completeness derivation. The domain-level missing_marker_ids field on ConsumerDomainScoreV1 (used for domain copy) is separate and must remain unchanged. The change affects evidence_completeness_numerator and evidence_completeness_denominator only. REGRESSION RISK: completeness values will change for all three domains on all analyses вЂ” cardiovascular and liver completeness will also shift. Targeted before/after tests required for all three domains on reference analysis 18e14232.

frontend/app/lib/retailNarrativeSanitize.ts:77 вЂ” current scrub: s.replace(/\bsignal_homocysteine_elevation_context\b/gi, 'homocysteine-related pattern'). This only scrubs the snake_case slug form. LAUNCH-CORE-0 В§6 A1 confirms the backend narrative compiler emits 'Homocysteine Elevation Context' (Title Case) from knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_homocysteine_elevation_context/signal_library.yaml display name. Title Case form passes through scrub unchanged. Scrub gap confirmed at retailNarrativeSanitize.ts:77.

Add case-insensitive replacement for Title Case form in scrubConsumerRetailNarrative() at retailNarrativeSanitize.ts, e.g.: s.replace(/\bhomocysteine\s+elevation\s+context\b/gi, 'Raised homocysteine pattern'). Final consumer wording must be intentionally consumer-facing. This is an interim surface scrub вЂ” the deeper narrative compiler fix (R2 in LAUNCH-CORE-0 В§12) is explicitly deferred. Both the snake_case slug replacement and the Title Case replacement must be present in the final function.

frontend/app/components/results/Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection.tsx:19-23 вЂ” markerRoleChipLabel() uses: return role.replace(/_/g, ' '). This produces 'score contributor', 'confidence contributor', 'contextual marker', etc. вЂ” raw engineering enum vocabulary. card_evidence_role_translation_policy.md defines 8 authoritative enum values with card-surface meanings. The policy Frontend rules section states: 'Render marker_role when provided on DTO marker rows' вЂ” but does not specify consumer-safe label substitution text. Sprint prompt provides the required consumer-safe mapping.

Replace markerRoleChipLabel() in Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection.tsx with a static lookup map covering all 8 role enums from card_evidence_role_translation_policy.md. Any role not in the map must return null (suppress chip) вЂ” not fall through to raw rendering. Do not infer from marker_id or display_label. Minimum mapping per prompt: score_contributorв†’'Used in this score'; confidence_contributorв†’'Supports confidence'; contextual_markerв†’'Context marker'; mechanism_markerв†’'Helps explain mechanism'; differential_markerв†’'Helps distinguish causes'; exclusion_markerв†’'Helps rule out alternatives'; missing_for_confidenceв†’'Missing for confidence'; optional_deeper_markerв†’'Optional deeper marker'. Final wording may differ from prompt examples but must be intentionally consumer-facing.

frontend/app/components/results/PrimaryFindingAndWhy.tsx:8-10 вЂ” formatMarkerRef() uses: id.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, (c) => c.toUpperCase()). This generic title-casing produces 'Mcv' from 'mcv'. LC_S7_BIOMARKER_LABELS map at frontend/app/lib/resultsPageLayout.ts:94-110 already contains mcv:'MCV'. formatBiomarkerDisplayName() is exported from resultsPageLayout.ts:112 and performs the SSOT-backed lookup with fallback.

Replace formatMarkerRef() in PrimaryFindingAndWhy.tsx to call formatBiomarkerDisplayName() imported from '@/lib/resultsPageLayout'. Do not re-implement the label map independently in PrimaryFindingAndWhy.tsx. The SSOT for biomarker display labels is LC_S7_BIOMARKER_LABELS in resultsPageLayout.ts вЂ” a single authority source must be maintained. The fallback title-case logic in formatBiomarkerDisplayName() handles unlisted IDs.

LAUNCH-CORE-0 В§8 C3: narrative mojibake 'Гў' replacement chars confirmed in lead_narrative field. Root cause: UTF-8 text passed through a Latin-1 hop at compile or persist time (narrative_report_compiler_v1.py is the likely boundary). If mojibake strings are in historically persisted analysis records, they cannot be retroactively corrected at record level without reprocessing. Bounded fix: add frontend display sanitisation in scrubConsumerRetailNarrative() for known mojibake substitutions (e.g. ГўВЂВ™в†’', ГўВЂВ”в†’вЂ”, ГўВЂВњв†’", ГўВЂВќв†’"). Document the limitation in the sprint report. If source is confirmed as live compile path (not persisted), fix at compile boundary in narrative_report_compiler_v1.py instead. Cursor must investigate before choosing path.

LAUNCH-CORE-0 В§8 C1: blood sugar 100/100 score with confidence_tier=low and evidence_completeness 1/3 (в†’2/4 after fix). Frontend renders both faithfully but no gating ties score display to evidence completeness. Sprint scope allows: qualify score visually when evidence coverage is limited, 'Score based on available markers' wording, ensure reliability/completeness text is visually close to score. Must NOT change clinical scoring thresholds. This is a frontend visual/copy change only (wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts and Wave1DomainCards.tsx). Backend domain score value is authoritative and must not change.

LAUNCH-CORE-0 В§7.3 point 3: HbA1c upload fidelity section shows 'Uploaded representation of HbA1c вЂ” not scored separately' while health card treats HbA1c as scored contributor. LAUNCH-CORE-0 classified as parallel surface disagreement, not a partition bug. Sprint scope item 8 allows aligning upload-fidelity wording where a marker is scored in one context but described as 'not scored separately'. This is a frontend copy or backend fidelity flag change вЂ” must not affect scoring or clinical output.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:139-149 вЂ” allowed scope: 10 items, all bounded to results-page coherence and consumer copy. automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:265-279 вЂ” out of scope: clinical thresholds, scoring rail calculations (unless needed only for completeness display alignment), biomarker SSOT, unit conversion, package clinical content, investigation specs, PSI runtime status, SignalRegistry, SignalEvaluator, root-cause pathways, compiled card evidence clinical meaning, ARCH-RT-6 guardrails, forbidden DTO field exposures, fallback parsers.

Key guardrails relevant to this sprint: Guardrail 5 (no total_bilirubin in compiled artefacts), Guardrails 6-7 (frontend render-only; source_trace filter вЂ” Wave1SubsystemEvidenceSection.tsx isConsumerSafeSourceTrace at line 25-31 must remain intact), Guardrail 8-10 (vitamin D compiled promotion). automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:281-304 вЂ” 10 required test targets enumerated. Existing test infrastructure confirmed: backend/scripts/validate_day_one_architecture.py вњ“; backend/tests/architecture/test_day_one_architecture_guardrails.py вњ“. Cursor must add targeted tests for: (1) blood sugar completeness aligns with compiled subsystem evidence, (2) completeness num/den no longer disagrees with expanded subsystem chips for all three domains, (3) role chips use consumer-safe labels, (4) Homocysteine Elevation Context does not render to consumer page, (5) mcv formats as MCV, (6) mojibake sanitised, (7) upload-fidelity wording corrected for HbA1c, (8) raw internal IDs/traces not rendered.

Completeness fix: deterministic вЂ” same inputs (panel_biomarker_ids, compiled subsystem rows) produce same (numerator, denominator) on every run. No randomness introduced. Scrub fixes: deterministic regex replacements. Role chip mapping: static lookup table, deterministic. MCV fix: static label map lookup, deterministic. No hidden side effects on scoring, signals, clinical thresholds, or analytical output structure. Output structure (DTO fields) unchanged except evidence_completeness_numerator and evidence_completeness_denominator, which change intentionally as declared.
